---
name: Feature request
about: Something Clarity.V doesn't do that you wish it did
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you have

What are you trying to do that Clarity.V makes hard or impossible?

## What you wish Clarity.V did

Describe the feature. Be specific — "better X" is harder to act on than "when I do A, Clarity.V should do B."

## Why Clarity.V's current capabilities don't solve it

Have you tried using the dictionary, voice commands, or settings to work around this? What's missing?

## Optional — implementation sketch

If you have a sense of where this would live in the codebase, mention it. PRs welcome.
